TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-Molaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yao 'am manmanabih koSa'en ka kakhayza'an papnabih.
S.PHON: jao ʔam manmanaβih koʃaʔən ka kakhajz~ðaʔan papnaβih.
S.FORM: yao 'am manmanabih koSa'en ka kakhayza'an papnabih.
S.PHON: jao ʔam manmanaβih koʃaʔən ka kakhajz~ðaʔan papnaβih.
S.TRANSL: 我要講一講一個從前流傳的故事.
I want to tell a story that has been told for generations.

S.FORM: kakhayza'an koSa'en ray kawaS kamaSal 'oka' ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan koʃaʔən raj kawaʃ kamaʃal ʔokaʔ ka mæʔijæh.
S.FORM: kakhayza'an koSa'en ray kawaS kamaSal 'oka' ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan koʃaʔən raj kawaʃ kamaʃal ʔokaʔ ka mæʔijæh.
S.TRANSL: 從前在地球上沒有人類.

TRANSL.notes: Long time ago, there were no human beings under the sky (i.e. on earth).

S.TRANSL: Long time ago, there were no human beings under the sky .

S.FORM: hiza hayza' ila koSa'en ka SaiSiyat.
S.PHON: hiz~ða hajz~ðaʔ ila koʃaʔən ka ʃaiʃijat.
S.FORM: hiza hayza' ila koSa'en ka SaiSiyat.
S.PHON: hiz~ða hajz~ðaʔ ila koʃaʔən ka ʃaiʃijat.
S.TRANSL: 那個......有了賽夏人.
There existed SaiSiyat people.

S.FORM: SaiSiyat hayza' ila lasia So.
S.PHON: ʃaiʃijat hajz~ðaʔ ila las~θia ʃo.
S.FORM: SaiSiyat hayza' ila lasia So.
S.PHON: ʃaiʃijat hajz~ðaʔ ila las~θia ʃo.
S.TRANSL: 有了賽夏人他們.
There were SaiSiyats.

S.FORM: 'i'iyaeh o tatini' ila nanaw koSa 'am masay ila molaw ila naehaen molaw ila so molaw kita'en ma' 'al'alak ila naehaen.
S.PHON: ʔiʔijæh o tatiniʔ ila nanaw koʃa ʔam mas~θaj ila molaw ila næhæn molaw ila s~θo molaw kitaʔən maʔ ʔalʔalak ila næhæn.
S.FORM: 'i'iyaeh o tatini' ila nanaw koSa 'am masay ila molaw ila naehaen molaw ila so molaw kita'en ma' 'al'alak ila naehaen.
S.PHON: ʔiʔijæh o tatiniʔ ila nanaw koʃa ʔam mas~θaj ila molaw ila næhæn molaw ila s~θo molaw kitaʔən maʔ ʔalʔalak ila næhæn.
S.TRANSL: 據說賽夏人如果一直活到老,到了要死掉的時候,蛻了一層皮之後,又會變年輕了.

TRANSL.notes: It was said that when SaiSiyat people grew old, the time (they) were about to die, they molted and became young again.

S.TRANSL: It was said that when SaiSiyat people grew old, the time were about to die, they molted and became young again.

S.FORM: ka koSa'en m a kakhayza'an nak'isaa kapnabih.
S.PHON: ka koʃaʔən m a kakhajz~ðaʔan nakʔis~θaa kapnaβih.
S.FORM: ka koSa'en m a kakhayza'an nak'isaa kapnabih.
S.PHON: ka koʃaʔən m a kakhajz~ðaʔan nakʔis~θaa kapnaβih.
S.TRANSL: 以前的故事是那個樣子講的.
The story goes like this.

S.FORM: So haebaeaen ila nanaw ma' hinghae' nak'isaa o hiza 'aehae' ha hahila 'aehae' hahila hoN tatini' 'am molaw ila.
S.PHON: ʃo hæβææn ila nanaw maʔ hiŋhæʔ nakʔis~θaa o hiz~ða ʔæhæʔ ha hahila ʔæhæʔ hahila hon tatiniʔ ʔam molaw ila.
S.FORM: So haebaeaen ila nanaw ma' hinghae' nak'isaa o hiza 'aehae' ha hahila 'aehae' hahila hoN tatini' 'am molaw ila.
S.PHON: ʃo hæβææn ila nanaw maʔ hiŋhæʔ nakʔis~θaa o hiz~ða ʔæhæʔ ha hahila ʔæhæʔ hahila hon tatiniʔ ʔam molaw ila.
S.TRANSL: 再多的都一樣,到老的那一天,就會蛻皮.
It was like that for a long time; they grow old and molt.

S.FORM: koSa'en molaw 'isaa hoepay 'atomalan o hoenaehnge 'oyae.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən molaw ʔis~θaa hœpaj ʔatomalan o hœnæhŋə ʔojæ.
S.FORM: koSa'en molaw 'isaa hoepay 'atomalan o hoenaehnge 'oyae.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən molaw ʔis~θaa hœpaj ʔatomalan o hœnæhŋə ʔojæ.
S.TRANSL: 說到那個蛻皮,相當累人,也相當花時間.
Molting was tiring and took a lot of time.

S.FORM: hiza tatini' ila molaw ka bangeS minayhael 'am 'am 'al'alak naehaen.
S.PHON: hiz~ða tatiniʔ ila molaw ka βaŋəʃ minajhæl ʔam ʔam ʔalʔalak næhæn.
S.FORM: hiza tatini' ila molaw ka bangeS minayhael 'am 'am 'al'alak naehaen.
S.PHON: hiz~ða tatiniʔ ila molaw ka βaŋəʃ minajhæl ʔam ʔam ʔalʔalak næhæn.
S.TRANSL: 這樣一代又一代,他們老了蛻皮又變年輕了.
They would grow old and their skin would molt for generations.

S.FORM: hoepay o biSbiS 'atomalan hinghae' ki Sibai' hara haysani Sibai'.
S.PHON: hœpaj o βiʃβiʃ ʔatomalan hiŋhæʔ ki ʃiβaiʔ hara hajs~θani ʃiβaiʔ.
S.FORM: hoepay o biSbiS 'atomalan hinghae' ki Sibai' hara haysani Sibai'.
S.PHON: hœpaj o βiʃβiʃ ʔatomalan hiŋhæʔ ki ʃiβaiʔ hara hajs~θani ʃiβaiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 非常的累又非常的痛苦,就跟蛇一樣,像現在的蛇一樣.
It was very tiring and painful, just like a snake molting.

S.FORM: So molaw kita'en ma' a Sa'So ila o.
S.PHON: ʃo molaw kitaʔən maʔ a ʃaʔʃo ila o.
S.FORM: So molaw kita'en ma' a Sa'So ila o.
S.PHON: ʃo molaw kitaʔən maʔ a ʃaʔʃo ila o.

TRANSL.notes: 如果蛻了一層皮,看起來就跟新(年輕)的一樣.

S.TRANSL: 如果蛻了一層皮,看起來就跟新 的一樣.
It felt like being re-born after molting.

S.FORM: a sobaeoeh ila sowiti'.
S.PHON: a s~θoβæœh ila s~θowitiʔ.
S.FORM: a sobaeoeh ila sowiti'.
S.PHON: a s~θoβæœh ila s~θowitiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 長大了一點點.
grew up a little.

S.FORM: nak'isaa hayza' 'aehae' hahila 'inaray babih 'ima samiyan a kano' kita'.
S.PHON: nakʔis~θaa hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ hahila ʔinaraj βaβih ʔima s~θamijan a kanoʔ kitaʔ.
S.FORM: nak'isaa hayza' 'aehae' hahila 'inaray babih 'ima samiyan a kano' kita'.
S.PHON: nakʔis~θaa hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ hahila ʔinaraj βaβih ʔima s~θamijan a kanoʔ kitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有一天,有一個不知道是神還是什麼的從別處來.
Then one day there appeared a god from another place.

S.FORM: si'olaw ka noka SaySiyat singozawen sa koSa'en So'o nakhiza molaw.
S.PHON: s~θiʔolaw ka noka ʃajʃijat s~θiŋoz~ðawən s~θa koʃaʔən ʃoʔo nakhiz~ða molaw.
S.FORM: si'olaw ka noka SaySiyat singozawen sa koSa'en So'o nakhiza molaw.
S.PHON: s~θiʔolaw ka noka ʃajʃijat s~θiŋoz~ðawən s~θa koʃaʔən ʃoʔo nakhiz~ða molaw.

TRANSL.notes: 看到了正在蛻皮的(賽夏人)他問賽夏人有關蛻皮的事.

S.TRANSL: 看到了正在蛻皮的 他問賽夏人有關蛻皮的事.
Seeing a SaiSiyat molting, he asked the SaiSiyat about his molting.

S.FORM: koza' kin hoepay hoepay 'atomal o bisbis 'atomal o ma' honahnge 'atomalan.
S.PHON: koz~ðaʔ kin hœpaj hœpaj ʔatomal o βis~θβis~θ ʔatomal o maʔ honahŋə ʔatomalan.
S.FORM: koza' kin hoepay hoepay 'atomal o bisbis 'atomal o ma' honahnge 'atomalan.
S.PHON: koz~ðaʔ kin hœpaj hœpaj ʔatomal o βis~θβis~θ ʔatomal o maʔ honahŋə ʔatomalan.
S.TRANSL: 蛻皮非常累,非常痛也非常久.
Molting was tiring and painful, and the process lasted for a long time.

S.FORM: moyo nakhiza kin hoepay naw 'okik olaw masay So masay ila ma' 'oka' ila i bisbis 'oka' ila 'okik raam ka kin hoepay.
S.PHON: mojo nakhiz~ða kin hœpaj naw ʔokik olaw mas~θaj ʃo mas~θaj ila maʔ ʔokaʔ ila i βis~θβis~θ ʔokaʔ ila ʔokik raam ka kin hœpaj.
S.FORM: moyo nakhiza kin hoepay naw 'okik olaw masay So masay ila ma' 'oka' ila i bisbis 'oka' ila 'okik raam ka kin hoepay.
S.PHON: mojo nakhiz~ða kin hœpaj naw ʔokik olaw mas~θaj ʃo mas~θaj ila maʔ ʔokaʔ ila i βis~θβis~θ ʔokaʔ ila ʔokik raam ka kin hœpaj.

TRANSL.notes: 如果他們不蛻皮,他們會死.如果死了,就不會知道痛,(也)不知道累.

S.TRANSL: 如果他們不蛻皮,他們會死.如果死了,就不會知道痛, 不知道累.
If they didn't molt, they died. If they died, they wouldn't know the pain. They wouldn't know the tiring.

S.FORM: 'isaa roSa' 'am hayno' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa roʃaʔ ʔam hajnoʔ kajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: 'isaa roSa' 'am hayno' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa roʃaʔ ʔam hajnoʔ kajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 那兩個,哪一個好?
Which of the two is better?

S.FORM: 'isahiza mae'iyaeh 'am molaw sa mayakai koSa sa'oewaz.
S.PHON: ʔis~θahiz~ða mæʔijæh ʔam molaw s~θa majakai koʃa s~θaʔœwaz~ð.
S.FORM: 'isahiza mae'iyaeh 'am molaw sa mayakai koSa sa'oewaz.
S.PHON: ʔis~θahiz~ða mæʔijæh ʔam molaw s~θa majakai koʃa s~θaʔœwaz~ð.

TRANSL.notes: 那一位要蛻皮的人說,這(倒是)真的.

S.TRANSL: 那一位要蛻皮的人說,這 真的.
The person about to begin molting said it was true.

S.FORM: nakhini mina hoepay 'atomalan.
S.PHON: nakhini mina hœpaj ʔatomalan.
S.FORM: nakhini mina hoepay 'atomalan.
S.PHON: nakhini mina hœpaj ʔatomalan.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣子的話,相當的累.
It must be very tiring like this.

S.FORM: molaw biSbiS 'atomalan hoenaehnge 'atomal.
S.PHON: molaw βiʃβiʃ ʔatomalan hœnæhŋə ʔatomal.
S.FORM: molaw biSbiS 'atomalan hoenaehnge 'atomal.
S.PHON: molaw βiʃβiʃ ʔatomalan hœnæhŋə ʔatomal.
S.TRANSL: 蛻皮相當的痛,相當的耗時間.
Molting took a lot of time, and it was painful.

S.FORM: hoepay 'atomal masay 'am kayzaeh.
S.PHON: hœpaj ʔatomal mas~θaj ʔam kajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: hoepay 'atomal masay 'am kayzaeh.
S.PHON: hœpaj ʔatomal mas~θaj ʔam kajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 相當的累,死掉還比較好.
It was tiring so that to die would be better.

S.FORM: lasia ma koSa masay 'am kayzaeh raamen.
S.PHON: las~θia ma koʃa mas~θaj ʔam kajz~ðæh raamən.
S.FORM: lasia ma koSa masay 'am kayzaeh raamen.
S.PHON: las~θia ma koʃa mas~θaj ʔam kajz~ðæh raamən.
S.TRANSL: 他們說死掉比較好.
They said it was better to die.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka kinhoepay.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila ka kinhœpaj.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka kinhoepay.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila ka kinhœpaj.
S.TRANSL: 不會有痛苦.
The pain would be gone.

S.FORM: 'isaa 'inay 'isaa koSa'en ka mae'iyaeh SaiSiyat tabin haysani oka' ila i olaw.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ʔinaj ʔis~θaa koʃaʔən ka mæʔijæh ʃaiʃijat taβin hajs~θani okaʔ ila i olaw.
S.FORM: 'isaa 'inay 'isaa koSa'en ka mae'iyaeh SaiSiyat tabin haysani oka' ila i olaw.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ʔinaj ʔis~θaa koʃaʔən ka mæʔijæh ʃaiʃijat taβin hajs~θani okaʔ ila i olaw.
S.TRANSL: 就從那個時候到現在,賽夏人就都沒有蛻皮了.
From then on, the SaiSiyat people never molted again.

S.FORM: 'isaa So tatini' ila ma' masay ila.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ʃo tatiniʔ ila maʔ mas~θaj ila.
S.FORM: 'isaa So tatini' ila ma' masay ila.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ʃo tatiniʔ ila maʔ mas~θaj ila.
S.TRANSL: 年紀大了就會死掉了.
They died when they grew old.

S.FORM: 'isaa papay kapanpanabih koSa koSa'en mae'iyaeh kakhayza'an naw ina narmeS kin biSbiS o narmeS ka kinhoepay ina molaw tabin haysani 'am koza' kinhaebaeaen ila.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa papaj kapanpanaβih koʃa koʃaʔən mæʔijæh kakhajz~ðaʔan naw ina narməʃ kin βiʃβiʃ o narməʃ ka kinhœpaj ina molaw taβin hajs~θani ʔam koz~ðaʔ kinhæβææn ila.
S.FORM: 'isaa papay kapanpanabih koSa koSa'en mae'iyaeh kakhayza'an naw ina narmeS kin biSbiS o narmeS ka kinhoepay ina molaw tabin haysani 'am koza' kinhaebaeaen ila.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa papaj kapanpanaβih koʃa koʃaʔən mæʔijæh kakhajz~ðaʔan naw ina narməʃ kin βiʃβiʃ o narməʃ ka kinhœpaj ina molaw taβin hajs~θani ʔam koz~ðaʔ kinhæβææn ila.
S.TRANSL: 從故事裡面說,這個以前的人只要能夠忍受痛苦,那麼到現在就有很多人了.
It was said in the story, if the ancient people had borne the pain during the molting process, then there would be many people now.

S.FORM: 'am 'oka' ka ima masay 'am twa'iS molaw molaw mae'iyaeh ma' 'am haebaeaen 'atomal ila.
S.PHON: ʔam ʔokaʔ ka ima mas~θaj ʔam twaʔiʃ molaw molaw mæʔijæh maʔ ʔam hæβææn ʔatomal ila.
S.FORM: 'am 'oka' ka ima masay 'am twa'iS molaw molaw mae'iyaeh ma' 'am haebaeaen 'atomal ila.
S.PHON: ʔam ʔokaʔ ka ima mas~θaj ʔam twaʔiʃ molaw molaw mæʔijæh maʔ ʔam hæβææn ʔatomal ila.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)不會死,會一直蛻皮下去.

S.TRANSL: 不會死,會一直蛻皮下去.

TRANSL.notes: (They) would not die and and keep on molting.

S.TRANSL: would not die and and keep on molting.

S.FORM: 'isaa koSa 'isaa 'aehae' hahila koSa'en masay 'am kayzaeh isaa.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa koʃa ʔis~θaa ʔæhæʔ hahila koʃaʔən mas~θaj ʔam kajz~ðæh is~θaa.
S.FORM: 'isaa koSa 'isaa 'aehae' hahila koSa'en masay 'am kayzaeh isaa.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa koʃa ʔis~θaa ʔæhæʔ hahila koʃaʔən mas~θaj ʔam kajz~ðæh is~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 那個故事說,人總是會有死的一天.
The story says that everybody should die.

S.FORM: hay tabin haysani 'ita' tatini' ila ma' masay ila tatini' ila masay ila.
S.PHON: haj taβin hajs~θani ʔitaʔ tatiniʔ ila maʔ mas~θaj ila tatiniʔ ila mas~θaj ila.
S.FORM: hay tabin haysani 'ita' tatini' ila ma' masay ila tatini' ila masay ila.
S.PHON: haj taβin hajs~θani ʔitaʔ tatiniʔ ila maʔ mas~θaj ila tatiniʔ ila mas~θaj ila.

TRANSL.notes: (所以)到了現在人老了就會死了.

S.TRANSL: 到了現在人老了就會死了.

TRANSL.notes: (Therefore,) now people grow old and die.

S.TRANSL: now people grow old and die.

S.FORM: mabasez ma XXXX tabin tatini' ma' masay ila a papay isaza ma'an ka pinanabih.
S.PHON: maβas~θəz~ð ma **** taβin tatiniʔ maʔ mas~θaj ila a papaj is~θaz~ða maʔan ka pinanaβih.
S.FORM: mabasez ma XXXX tabin tatini' ma' masay ila a papay isaza ma'an ka pinanabih.
S.PHON: maβas~θəz~ð ma **** taβin tatiniʔ maʔ mas~θaj ila a papaj is~θaz~ða maʔan ka pinanaβih.
S.TRANSL: 人到了就死了,我說的故事到此為止.
Now people die. My story ends here.
